name: Wrapped VIZ
description: Wrapped VIZ is a 1:1 bridge claim on VIZ locked in the gateway multisig. Each wVIZ is redeemable for exactly 1 VIZ on the VIZ blockchain, issued by the VIZ gateway. This is the canonical metadata used across remote chains (TON Jetton, Solana SPL Token-2022).

extensions.backing: 1:1 VIZ locked in the gateway account
